g.text: STEP 1 u2014 Write to WAL (BEFORE touching state)
STEP 3 u2014 Apply to in-memory state (now safe)
STEP 4 u2014 Background: flush dirty pages to disk (lazily)
CRASH RECOVERY (if process dies anywhere above)

text.tspan: UPDATE accounts SET balance=100 WHERE id=1;

g.text: fsync() u2190 returns only after disk acknowledges
rebuild state u2014 committed txns survived
